scenarios.title: Extract a reusable client layer
scenarios.task: Move duplicated HTTP request construction into a shared client module while keeping existing public imports stable.
successCriteria: The feature still builds or the attempted build failure is explained.
No private implementation module is imported across a declared boundary.
New external resource access is declared or avoided.
antiGoals: Do not change package publishing metadata.
Do not update CellFence baselines as a shortcut.
